payload.answer: Ignored duplicate Slack event retry; no memory created or updated.
citations: Input: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
payload.decision: No new durable memory; this appears to be the same Slack event delivered twice, so it should be treated as a retry rather than a new fact.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a duplicate delivery of the same event ID, so no new entity resolution is needed.

details: Preserved ambiguity and avoided committing duplicate durable memory.

repair_options: If this was meant to be a distinct event, provide a new Slack event ID or additional distinguishing context.
If a memory card was expected, resend the original non-duplicate event payload.
